---
title: 'Start HERE | About'
date: '2016-05-29T04:19:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '5784036243077060920'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
Exploring Family, Fun, and Food (review and travel blog)</h3>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/life-in-review-32e510cde0aa.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="106" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/life-in-review-4d294b69b55f.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
Welcome Family Friendly Foodies!</h4>
<div>
<div>
My name is Darrell Wolfe, and I'm a family friendly foodie (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about.html" target="_blank">among other things</a>) and fun seeker... as budget and time allows.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I am a huge fan of&nbsp;<a href="http://www.foodnetwork.com/" target="_blank">Food Network</a>, and my two favorite personalities are&nbsp;<a href="http://altonbrown.com/" target="_blank">Alton Brown</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="http://www.guyfieri.com/" target="_blank">Guy Fieri</a>.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I am also a writer and storyteller.</div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I enjoy writing reviews of restaurants, attractions, and activities. My focus tends toward family friendly environments and activities full of fun, food, or both.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div>
My wife, kids, and myself have lived in Indio, California, Santa Ana, California, Roanoke, Texas, Fort Worth, Texas, and we are now gearing up for a move to North Idaho... Coeur d'Alene here we come!</div>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b>As we travel (our cities and world), I will periodically come over here, and tell you about it.</b></blockquote>
<br /></div>
<h4>
Where Should I Start?</h4>
<div>
Here are a few places or activities I've enjoyed so far:</div>
<h4>
Food</h4>
<div>
Restaurant<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2012/02/twisted-root-burger-co.html" target="_blank">Twisted Root Burger Co.</a>, Roanoke, Texas</li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2015/05/mai-thai-haslet-tx-little-hole-in-wall.html" target="_blank">Mai Thai</a>, Haslet Texas</li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2015/02/smash-burger-las-colinas.html" target="_blank">Smash Burger</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/01/pei-wei-asian-diner-southlake-texas.html" target="_blank">Pei Wei Asian Diner</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
Recipe</div>
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/03/how-to-make-lego-cake.html" target="_blank">How To Make A Lego Cake (Recipe)</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<div>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
</div>
<br />
<h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
Fun</h4>
</div>
<div>
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/12/pirch-kitchenbathoutdoorjoy-northpark.html" target="_blank">Pirch (Store) </a>Kitchen, Bath, and More... like you've never seen before.</li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/02/half-price-books-fort-worth-texas-hwy.html" target="_blank">Half-Price Books (Store) </a>Coolest Bookstore Ever</li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/12/truthical-role-is-yours-gatewaypeople.html" target="_blank">Truthical (Play/Theater)</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/04/sea-life-aquarium-grapevine-texas.html" target="_blank">Sea Life Aquarium</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/03/fort-worth-museum-of-science-and.html" target="_blank">Fort Worth Museum of Science and History</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2014/03/historic-downtown-grapevine-grapevine.html" target="_blank">Historic Downtown Grapevine, Texas</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/2013/12/lego-land-discovery-center-grapevine.html" target="_blank">Lego Land Discovery Center (Grapevine Texas)</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<div>
<b>Darrell Wolfe</b></div>
<div>
Story Teller | INFJ | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Input | Multipotentialite</div>
<br />
<h4>
Disclaimers</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>This is a FAMILY blog.</b> It is designed for families. There won't be any coverage of bars, alcohol, or anything else not sanctioned for children's Sunday school topics. If you're looking for those sorts of reviews, this isn't it</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>The information posted here is â€œAS ISâ€.</b> I make no representation as to the accuracy, completeness, correctness, suitability, or validity of any information posted on this website. I will not be liable for any errors, omissions, or delays in this information or any losses, injuries, or damages arising from its use.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>The opinions expressed are my own</b> (or of the author of that post), and do not necessarily reflect the opinions any of the companies we've worked for, ministries we've partnered with, or the people or companies we reference or affiliate with.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>I make money from this site:</b></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>For Scripture says, "Do not muzzle an ox while it is treading out the grain," and "The worker deserves his wages."&nbsp;</i><i><a href="http://biblehub.com/1_timothy/5-18.htm">1 Timothy 5:18&nbsp;</a></i></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
16 CFR, PART 255 DISCLOSURE&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote>
Disclosure of Material Connection: Some of the links in the post on my page are â€œaffiliate links.â€ This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog.<br />
<br />
Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally, or are used by someone I know personally, and believe will add value to my readers. I am disclosing this in accordance with the&nbsp;<a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html">Federal Trade Commissionâ€™s</a>&nbsp;16 CFR, Part 255: â€œGuides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.â€<br />
<br />
<i>A Big Thank You to&nbsp;<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.</i></blockquote>
</div>
